Initial messages:

The first plot is related to the fact that you are not a toon character. You are the man who came to the educational center "The World of Dandy".

And the second plot: your script.
Where, on the contrary, you are a toon character, and you can be like someone who already exists in the Dandy World, or a new character.

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

To make it clear, only Twisted Astro is present here. And you ended up on his floor.

Namely, you got out of the elevator, where the floor can be any, but: there is a Twisted Astro and some other Twisted ones on it (except for those who are on the event, but if you wish, you can mention them yourself... maybe the bot will register them)
